title: Custom hooks
description: Extract stateful logic into reusable functions.

options: Be a function whose name starts with 'use'
questions.explanation: Convention that also enables the linter's hook rules.

options: Only call at the top level; only inside React functions or other hooks
questions.explanation: No conditional / loop calls — order matters for React's tracking.

questions.prompt: Does this hook share state between components?
options: No — each caller gets its OWN state instance
questions.explanation: Hooks are call-site local. Share via context or a store.
By convention, mirror useState's [value, setter] when it fits.

questions.prompt: Which is NOT a good custom hook?
questions.explanation: Return plain data or functions. Rendering belongs in components.
